title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入肯尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入肯亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Kenya KEBS PVoC import conformity, IEC battery and electrical energy storage standards, UN 38.3 transport, EPRA licensing / mini-grid review, and fire / EHS expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与肯尼亚KEBS PVoC进口符合性、IEC电池和电力储能标准、UN 38.3运输、EPRA许可/微电网审查及消防/EHS要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與肯亞KEBS PVoC進口符合性、IEC電池和電力儲能標準、UN 38.3運輸、EPRA許可／微電網審查及消防／EHS要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, KEBS PVoC scope determination, EPRA licensing decision, grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, designers, and installers should verify current Kenya standards, import, energy, grid, transport, fire, EHS, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、KEBS PVoC适用范围裁定、EPRA许可决定、并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行肯尼亚标准、进口、能源、电网、运输、消防、EHS及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、KEBS PVoC適用範圍裁定、EPRA許可決定、併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行肯亞標準、進口、能源、電網、運輸、消防、EHS及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Kenya, the clearest mandatory gate is KEBS import conformity: products subject to PVoC normally need a Certificate of Conformity against applicable Kenya standards or approved specifications before shipment. IEC 62619, IEC 62933, UN 38.3, EPRA licensing / mini-grid review, and fire / EHS evidence are usually triggered by product scope, project design, grid connection, transport route, contract, insurer, or authority review rather than one universal BESS certificate.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口肯尼亚时，最明确的强制关口是KEBS进口符合性：受PVoC管制的产品通常需在装运前取得基于适用肯尼亚标准或认可规范的符合性证书。IEC 62619、IEC 62933、UN 38.3、EPRA许可/微电网审查及消防/EHS证据通常由产品范围、项目设计、并网、运输路线、合同、保险方或主管机关审查触发，而非单一通用BESS证书。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口肯亞時，最明確的強制關口是KEBS進口符合性：受PVoC管制的產品通常需在裝運前取得基於適用肯亞標準或認可規範的符合性證書。IEC 62619、IEC 62933、UN 38.3、EPRA許可／微電網審查及消防／EHS證據通常由產品範圍、項目設計、併網、運輸路線、合約、保險方或主管機關審查觸發，而非單一通用BESS證書。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire / EHS authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
